description:
"Do I smell a scent of cinnamon? Or is it just me?"

Guyysss.. you know what time it is!! (ITS TIMEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEE!!!!!!!!)

I'm so excited for this month and the next! (i turn 19 in 11/10 days!)

But also, merry EARLY christmas!!! :D

This wasn't requested, i just had a feeling making Ginger and the other Christmas toons will be fun!

BEFORE YOU ASK,

NO. PEBBLE NOR COAL WILL BE MENTIONED.

DUE TO THEM BEING ANAMORPHIC ANIMALS.

I DO NOT WANT TO GET CALLED A ZOOPHILE, THAT IS DISGUSTING.

Anywho, Have a lovely Day/Night, and i'll be making the other toons soon! -Roki
